original_image_tags: Several small, dark ink blots or stamp marks.

elements.description: Multiple ink stamps are visible on the page. One stamp in the bottom left corner reads 'RECEIVED - MAIL ROOM FBI U.S. DEPT OF JUSTICE MAY 11 10 36 AM '56 BELMONT'. Another stamp in the bottom center reads 'FBI - JUSTICE REDD. BELMONT MAY 10 2 19 PM '56'. A rectangular red stamp on the right edge contains the text 'COPY TO: C.M. EANES BY: L. C. COHLMIA DATE: 4 1 MAY 5 1'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of multiple ink stamps on the page, but Description B provides specific quoted text for each stamp while Description A only mentions 'dark ink blots or stamp marks' without contradicting the quoted text.
